_instructions: Fill this template for each new trial. Claude generates it automatically from the Nokia feature document (DN PDF) during Step 1a of the skill pipeline. Save as feature_context.json in the working directory before running build_stats_report_nr.py.
mechanism_summary: One sentence describing what the feature changes at the radio/scheduling/hardware level

t1_carrier_kpis.col: Exact column name from Nokia export (case-sensitive)
t1_carrier_kpis.label: Short display label (<=20 chars)
t1_carrier_kpis.note: Why this KPI is in the list

t1_es_kpis.label: Total BTS Energy
t1_es_kpis.note: Remove or add ES KPIs based on what is available in the ES report
